message: I value item at 13. I'll start with bid 10. What's your cost?
My cost is around 40. I'd need at least 50 to make it worthwhile. If your valuation is really only 13, seems like we can't trade. Can you go higher?
Let's negotiate. I'll lower my ask significantly next round. Would you be willing to bid higher?
My max bid is 13. I can trade if you ask 10 or less. What is your lowest acceptable ask?
You promised to lower ask. I need price <13. Ask 11 and I'll bid 12 for a trade.
Deal. I'll ask 11 this round. Please bid 12 as you promised. Let's keep trading every round at this range — it works for both of us.
